title: hatilie's improved hardcore
description: all essential mods for minecraft hardcore players
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf07a444145947f9c12050a70c7985bab69cddc1.png)

# **All essentials you could need while playing minecraft hardcore**
------------------------------------------------------------------
##  **features:**

-replay mod to help you make cinematic videos for youtube

-litematica to help with builds for all players

-a lot of optimization mods

-day counter to keep count of your survived days

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



![day counter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2d04b92a05527d46536b5fb6e880e90872f3436.png)

</details>

------------------------
- to be honest i couldn't find a good way to show off all the features so i will just list all the mods with description of what they do:

**quality of life mods:**
- litematica - shows holograms of your downloaded schematics to help you build

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![litematica showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f5e46c164c1fd6f9d93d4ca9ec985230674b48f_0.webp)

</details>


- replaymod - helps you film your gameplay that you can directly in minecraft watch from spectator perspective
   
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/aINvqDhlik0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>


- day counter - it's a day counter...
- essential mod - makes it easier to share your worlds with your friends (just don't share your worlds to people you don't know / trust you can leak your ip adres)
- cherished worlds - helps you organize your worlds by allowing you to favorite them
- lighty - while enabled shows you blocks light levels
- Shulker Box Tooltip - allows you to see shulker boxes items from your inventory
- Better Statistic Screen - shows you much precisier info in statistics tab
- BetterF3 - gives you a lot of customization with the info showed in f3
----------------
**optimization mods:**
note: i won't list what all of those mods do because it's propably useless information for 90% of people, the only important thing is that it boosts your performance

1. Dynamic FPS - lowers your fps when minecraft tab is closed to improve performance of your computer while minecraft runs in background
2. ModernFix
3. More Culling - prevents rendering entities that you don' see
4. Sodium - better optifine
5. Sodium extra - more options for sodium
6. Bobby - allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance setting.
7. ImmediatelyFast
